caribbean.headline: Caribbean Sees High Rain
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing 94% rain probability with winds reaching 12 kt and wave heights of 2.9 ft, while St. Lucia has a less than 10% rain probability is not applicable as the data for St Lucia was not provided for rain, however it has max wind of 11 kt. I am monitoring these conditions closely as they may impact marine activities in the Lesser Antilles.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing 23 kt winds with a 12% rain probability, and wave heights are reaching 3.9 ft. Venice will see relatively calmer conditions with max winds of 13 kt and less than 10% rain probability.
